title: Project: Python Environment Diagnostics Tool
tagline: Build a comprehensive system information tool.
description: Create a CLI tool that displays detailed information about the python environment: version, installed packages, system info, and environment variables.
solution:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
import sys, os, platform

def main():
    print("="*60)
    print("  Python Environment Diagnostics")
    print("="*60)
    print(f"\nInterpreter: {sys.version}")
    print(f"Path: {sys.executable}")
    print(f"OS: {platform.system()} {platform.release()}")
    print(f"CPU Cores: {os.cpu_count()}")
    for key in ['PATH','HOME','USER']:
        if key in os.environ:
            print(f"{key}={os.environ[key][:80]}...")
    print("\n" + "="*60)
expectedOutput: Your application produces the expected output.
solutionExplanation: This project demonstrates practical application of the concept.
